_comment: AI Business OS — Workspace Integrations Configuration
_instructions: This file is populated by /setup during initial workspace configuration.

email._comment: Email integration (optional — not required for PRIMA core functionality)
email.notes: No email MCP available for Apple Mail — graceful degradation

meetings._comment: Video meeting integration for upcoming meetings display

storage._comment: Cloud storage location for heavy files (PDFs, Office docs)

collaboration._comment: Team collaboration tools already in use

projectNumbering._comment: How project IDs are generated. Prefix + zero-padded number. Folder names become 'P001 Project Name'. Change prefix and digits to match your conventions (e.g., 'PRJ-' with 4 digits = 'PRJ-0001 Project Name').

projectManagement._comment: Existing project management tools (for potential future integration)

features._comment: PRIMA features to enable based on client needs

deployment._comment: Deployment metadata for support and troubleshooting
